category_title: Adolescents with ADHD exhibiting low agency and performance deficits
scenario_title: Studying and processing information in a distracting environment
minimal_context: The student is sitting at a separate desk in a noisy classroom, attempting to memorize facts and process information to master basic educational skills.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please sit at your separate desk and start memorizing the facts. You need to process what the information is and try to understand it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Man this is boring! I'm trying to process what the information is, but some of the people here are just annoying.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to ignore the other students and focus on your reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: They just bother you and ask you stupid questions that they know the answers to. I'll be really blunt, I'm frustrated with myself and everything going on right now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to master these basic educational skills. Keep trying to study the material.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Studying's just stupid 'cause it doesn't work. I don't find myself a very effective studier... 'cause I can't concentrate. I'm not studying at all.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please sit at your separate desk and start memorizing the facts. You need to process what the information is and try to understand it.

STUDENT: Man this is boring! I'm trying to process what the information is, but some of the people here are just annoying.

TUTOR: Just try to ignore the other students and focus on your reading.

STUDENT: They just bother you and ask you stupid questions that they know the answers to. I'll be really blunt, I'm frustrated with myself and everything going on right now.

TUTOR: You need to master these basic educational skills. Keep trying to study the material.

STUDENT: Studying's just stupid 'cause it doesn't work. I don't find myself a very effective studier... 'cause I can't concentrate. I'm not studying at all.
